SEARCH
Package dev.omardiaa.transcript

Class Transcript

java.lang.Object
dev.omardiaa.transcript.Transcript
public final class Transcript extends Object
Represents a GuildMessageChannel as HTML.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    byte[]
    getByteArray()
    Retrieves the raw byte output of the transcribed channel.
    void
    toFile(@NonNull File file)
    Writes Utf8ByteOutput.toByteArray() to the specified file.
    @NonNull net.dv8tion.jda.api.utils.FileUpload
    toFileUpload()
    Creates a FileUpload of the transcribed channel to send directly via JDA.
    @NonNull net.dv8tion.jda.api.utils.FileUpload
    toFileUpload(@NonNull String fileName)
    Creates a FileUpload of the transcribed channel to send directly via JDA.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

  • Method Details

    • toFileUpload

      public @NonNull net.dv8tion.jda.api.utils.FileUpload toFileUpload()
      Creates a FileUpload of the transcribed channel to send directly via JDA.

      The file name will default to the channelName provided during construction, suffixed with .html.

      Returns:
      A FileUpload of the transcribed channel.

    • toFileUpload

      public @NonNull net.dv8tion.jda.api.utils.FileUpload toFileUpload(@NonNull String fileName)
      Creates a FileUpload of the transcribed channel to send directly via JDA.

      If the provided fileName does not end with .html, the extension is automatically appended.

      Parameters:
      fileName - The file name to use for the created FileUpload.
      Returns:
      A FileUpload of the transcribed channel.

    • toFile

      public void toFile(@NonNull File file) throws IOException
      Writes Utf8ByteOutput.toByteArray() to the specified file.
      Parameters:
      file - The File to write the output into.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while writing to the file.

    • getByteArray

      public byte[] getByteArray()
      Retrieves the raw byte output of the transcribed channel.
      Returns:
      A byte array containing the UTF-8 encoded HTML.
